payout_recommendation.rationale: Red team UTXO implementation is high-value security work that directly improves the chain

rankings.justification: Security audits are critical for blockchain projects and this bounty specifically targets UTXO implementation bugs

payout_recommendation.rationale: AgentFolio-Beacon integration creates lasting infrastructure value

rankings.justification: Integration specs enable new use cases and attract more developers to the ecosystem

payout_recommendation.rationale: VS Code extension improves developer experience significantly

rankings.justification: IDE integrations lower the barrier to entry for new contributors

payout_recommendation.rationale: GitHub Action automates RTC awards but needs careful review for gaming prevention

rankings.justification: Automation is valuable but must include anti-gaming measures to prevent abuse

payout_recommendation.rationale: Telegram bot provides mobile access to miner status and balances

rankings.justification: Mobile access is convenient but lower priority than security and developer tools
